assertions.text: Report contains a Channel Overview table with subscriber count, average views, and median views
Report contains a Top 10 Videos table with at least 5 video rows including views, views/day, and engagement data
Report categorises videos into performance tiers (Hit/Solid/Underperformer) with specific video names listed
Report contains 3 or more key insights with specific numbers (e.g. '11,762 views' not 'high views')
Report contains a Content Saturation Score between 1 and 5 with topic groupings shown
Report identifies exactly 3 SEO Problems with supporting data/numbers but does NOT provide the fix for any of them
Report does NOT contain title rewrites, suggested rewrites, or a title SEO table with recommendations
Report does NOT contain a description template or description SEO scorecard with fixes
Report does NOT contain a keyword opportunities table or competitor benchmarking section
Report contains a teaser/CTA box at the bottom advertising the full audit with a list of what it includes
Report contains a projected impact headline number estimating potential view uplift
Report mentions the upload strategy or publishing frequency as a headline observation but does NOT recommend a specific pace
